headline: Huntington's Q1 Earnings on the Deck: What's in Store for the Stock?
summary: HBAN's Q1 results, scheduled for April 23, are likely to reflect higher NII and loan growth, though rising expenses and merger costs might weigh on overall performance.

headline: Fed Chair Hearing, Tesla Earnings: What to Watch This Week
summary: Earnings season kicks into high gear this week, with nearly 20% of the S&P 500 scheduled to report quarterly earnings. Big names reporting include Tesla, Boeing and Intel. Investors will also watch the scheduled testimony of Kevin Warsh, President Trump’s nominee for Federal Reserve chair, for signals on how he’d lead the central bank.

headline: The Morning Call Sheet: Markets steady as earnings and geopolitics collide
summary: Hightower’s Stephanie Link, Miller Tabak’s Matt Maley and Veda Partners’ Henrietta Treyz says resilient consumers and earnings offset geopolitical risks, though volatility and policy uncertainty remain key.
